nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly use it for brainstorming

nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.grounding_span: I know that AI is wrong sometimes

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: my written communications sound more natural than AI

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a good tool to work with collaboratively, but not as a replacement for anything

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It significantly lessened the time it would normally take to leave plans for a substitute

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I know that AI is wrong sometimes

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: my written communications sound more natural than AI

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I never want to rely on AI to the point that I lose my own ability in these areas

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: It significantly lessened the time it would normally take to leave plans for a substitute

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do all factual research myself, as I know that AI is wrong sometimes

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to do any communicative writing myself, as my written communications sound more natural than AI

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will continue to use it for brainstorming ideas, but will always be weary of it for factual knowledge and communications

nodes.label: Task-based delegation — clear boundary between brainstorming and end-product tasks
nodes.grounding_span: they are requesting an end product, while the brainstorming tasks are asking for a jumping off point

nodes.label: Deliberate skill preservation through manual practice
nodes.grounding_span: I never want to rely on AI to the point that I accept it as always correct or that I lose my own ability
